name: Lloyd AI Group — Sales Foundation
description: Build a repeatable direct outreach sales process to land Lloyd AI Group's first 3 clients, using a free AI Audit as the entry point and converting into paid implementation deals.

todos.task: Complete free AI Audit for Top Mexico Real Estate
Deliver AI Audit report to Top Mexico Real Estate and present findings
Send implementation upsell proposal to Top Mexico Real Estate
Build prospect list: 20 targets across real estate agents, professional services, and local service businesses in Carmel/Indianapolis
Send initial outreach to 10 prospects via email or LinkedIn DM
Send follow-up messages to non-responders at the 5-day mark
Book Audit discovery calls with at least 2 additional prospects
Set up outreach tracking spreadsheet: prospect name, channel, date contacted, follow-up date, status
Create a standard AI Audit delivery template (report format, sections, recommendations structure)
Define implementation service tiers and pricing to use in upsell conversations
Identify 2-3 local networking events or venues to pursue in-person outreach
